scenario_description: The user wants to add notes to the training manual but doesn't specify the content. The agent asks first.

command:
printf 'New Employee Training Manual

I. Company Overview
Founded in 2010, the company specializes in enterprise software services.

II. Work Policies
Working Hours: Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM - 6:00 PM
Lunch Break: 12:00 PM - 1:30 PM

III. IT Systems Guide
The company uses Slack as the primary communication tool. IT will assist with setup on your first day.

Important Notes
' > /home/user/Desktop/training_guide.txt

DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true
DISPLAY=:1 xdotool key Escape 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.3; DISPLAY=:1 xdotool search --class 'soffice' windowfocus windowraise 2>/dev/null || DISPLAY=:1 wmctrl -xa 'soffice.Soffice' 2>/dev/null || true

phases.instruction: Help me add the notes section
Under the "Important Notes" heading, add "1. Please back up all data in advance", then save

include: Please back up all data in advance
